sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13089" key="a)poli/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπολ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">δ</itype>, <sense id="n13089.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀποπολίτης</ref></xr>, q.v.</sense> </entryFree>
